summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Sahabat Wisata Jember travel website. All major sections load and function correctly. Core user flows (tab switching, WA links, FAQ accordion, mobile menu) all work. Minor issues are missing data-testid attributes on several elements.

issues: Destination dropdown and passenger count fields are slightly truncated on 390px (labels cut off: 'Tujuan..' and '1 Penun') - minor readability issue

missing_data_testids.element: Service card Tanya via WA buttons

passing_tests: Homepage loads with hero, background image, heading visible
4 tabs present: Travel, Wisata, Armada, Rombongan - all clickable
Hero search box visible with form fields
Hero CTA submit button (data-testid='hero-cta-submit') present
Navbar (data-testid='navbar') visible
Navbar transparent initially, becomes solid on scroll
Trust bar 4 items visible (Berpengalaman, Armada Terawat, Driver Profesional, Harga Jujur)
Services section (data-testid='services-section') visible with 4 cards
Routes section (data-testid='routes-section') with 3 route cards (Jember-Surabaya, Jember-Malang, Jember-Bali)
Tours section (data-testid='tours-section') with 2 cards (Bromo, Ijen)
Fleet section (data-testid='fleet-section') with 3 vehicle cards
Booking flow 4 steps visible
FAQ section (data-testid='faq-section') visible, accordion toggle (faq-toggle-faq-1) works
CTA Banner (orange section) visible with WA button
Footer visible with contact info, links, address
Floating WA button (data-testid='floating-wa-btn') always visible
Floating WA links to correct number: wa.me/6285732431396
All 16 WA links on page point to correct number 6285732431396
Mobile responsive at 390px - all sections visible
Mobile hamburger menu button works and opens menu
action_items: Add data-testid='navbar-wa-btn' to the Hubungi WA button in Navbar.jsx
Add data-testid='service-wa-btn-{serviceId}' to Tanya via WA buttons in ServicesSection.jsx
Add data-testid='booking-section' to the booking flow section wrapper
Add data-testid='cta-section' to the CTA banner section wrapper
Add data-testid='mobile-menu-btn' to the hamburger button in Navbar.jsx
Fix mobile dropdown labels being truncated (Tujuan.., 1 Penun) - consider smaller font or abbreviated labels
critical_code_review_comments: Missing data-testid attributes on multiple interactive elements reduces testability (5 elements missing)
Hero CTA is a <button> not <a> - ensure onClick handler correctly opens WA with window.open or similar
context_for_next_testing_agent: Travel website fully functional. Missing data-testid attributes on: navbar-wa-btn, service-wa-btn-*, booking-section, cta-section, mobile-menu-btn. All sections render correctly. 16 WA links all correctly point to 6285732431396.
